openGraph.title: age calculator
openGraph.ogTitle: Age Calculator for Birthday & Next Birthday Countdown
openGraph.description: Calculate your age from a birth date and reference date with a full breakdown in years, months, and days. Instantly check your next birthday, how many days remain, and copy a clean age summary for family, kids, or personal records.

title: Age Calculator
description: Find your exact age and see how long until your next birthday.

results.title: Age Summary
results.empty: Enter your birth date to see the result.

messages.futureBirth: Birth date cannot be later than the reference date.

example.title: Example
example.text: Birth date 1998-04-12 → 27 years 10 months 0 days (as of today).
